title: `UNSUPPORTED_METHOD`/`NOT_FOUND_COLUMN_IN_BLOCK` with parallel replicas and join with non-MT left table
description:
### Describe what's wrong
Query where left table is `Memory` and right is `MergeTree` returns in `UNSUPPORTED_METHOD`/`NOT_FOUND_COLUMN_IN_BLOCK` depending on version or `query_plan_use_logical_join_step`
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
<details>
<summary>Details</summary>
```SQL
SET enable_parallel_replicas=1,
max_parallel_replicas=3,
parallel_replicas_for_non_replicated_merge_tree = 1,
cluster_for_parallel_replicas = 'parallel_replicas';
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS events;
CREATE TABLE events ( `Id` UInt64, `Payload` String, `Time` DateTime ) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO events SELECT number, concat('Payload_', toString(number)), toDateTime('2024-01-01 00:00:00') + INTERVAL number MINUTES FROM numbers(10);
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS attributes;
CREATE TABLE attributes ( `EventId` UInt64, `Attribute` String ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY EventId;
INSERT INTO attributes SELECT 32 AS EventId, 'attr' AS Attribute;
SET query_plan_join_swap_table = 0;
SET enable_analyzer = 1;
SELECT count(), countIf(t1.Attribute != ''), sum(sipHash64(t1.Attribute))
FROM events AS t0 INNER JOIN attributes AS t1 ON t1.EventId = t0.Id
;
```
</details>
### Error message and/or stacktrace
<details>
<summary>Details</summary>
```bash
ubuntu@ip-172-31-42-13~/ClickHouse1 $ ~/clickhouse-client --queries-file ./test.sql
Received exception from server (version 25.11.2):
Code: 10. DB::Exception: Received from localhost:9000. DB::Exception: Columns [__table2.EventId] are not found in blocks [__table1.Id], [count(), countIf(notEmpty(__table2.Attribute)), sum(sipHash64(__table2.Attribute))]. (NOT_FOUND_COLUMN_IN_BLOCK)
(query: SELECT count(), countIf(t1.Attribute != ''), sum(sipHash64(t1.Attribute))
FROM events AS t0 INNER JOIN attributes AS t1 ON t1.EventId = t0.Id
;)
ubuntu@ip-172-31-42-13~/ClickHouse1 $ ~/clickhouse-client --queries-file ./test.sql
Received exception from server (version 25.8.12):
Code: 10. DB::Exception: Received from localhost:9000. DB::Exception: Not found column __table2.Attribute in block __table1.Id UInt64 UInt64(size = 0). (NOT_FOUND_COLUMN_IN_BLOCK)
(query: SELECT count(), countIf(t1.Attribute != ''), sum(sipHash64(t1.Attribute))
FROM events AS t0 INNER JOIN attributes AS t1 ON t1.EventId = t0.Id
;)
ubuntu@ip-172-31-42-13~/ClickHouse1 $ ~/clickhouse-client --queries-file ./test.sql
Received exception from server (version 25.7.8):
Code: 1. DB::Exception: Received from localhost:9000. DB::Exception: JOIN  INNER JOIN ... ON t1.EventId = t0.Id right table expression expected to process query to fetch columns stage. Actual WithMergeableState. (UNSUPPORTED_METHOD)
(query: SELECT count(), countIf(t1.Attribute != ''), sum(sipHash64(t1.Attribute))
FROM events AS t0 INNER JOIN attributes AS t1 ON t1.EventId = t0.Id
;)
ubuntu@ip-172-31-42-13~/ClickHouse1 $ ~/clickhouse-client --queries-file ./test.sql --query_plan_use_logical_join_step=0
Received exception from server (version 25.7.8):
Code: 1. DB::Exception: Received from localhost:9000. DB::Exception: JOIN  INNER JOIN ... ON t1.EventId = t0.Id right table expression expected to process query to fetch columns stage. Actual WithMergeableState. (UNSUPPORTED_METHOD)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE events ( Id INTEGER, Payload TEXT, Time DATETIME, Status TEXT );

INSERT INTO events (Id, Payload, Time, Status) SELECT number, 'Payload_' || number, datetime('2024-01-01 00:00:00', '+' || number || ' minute'), CASE WHEN number % 2 = 0 THEN 'active' ELSE NULL END FROM (SELECT 0 AS number UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9);
CREATE TABLE attributes ( EventId INTEGER, Attribute TEXT, Value REAL DEFAULT 0.0 );
key_bug_features: Join with Memory and MergeTree tables in parallel replicas
